title: Moderation-queue submission (anomaly)
description: For observations the strict auto-report gate rejects but that may be legitimately new (e.g. a road at a Y other than 120, or a plausible on-line position on a road not yet in the map). Still narrow-waist: no free (x,z). A human operator approves it into geometry/conditions or discards it.

observedY.description: the Y actually observed (why it missed the strict y120 gate)

note.description: optional free-text context for the human reviewer
